title: AI 特定风格小说再获文学奖 建议引入全字母句检测
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
AI is generally a weak fiction writer except for one particular kind of fiction (metaphor-rich, staccato sentences, short & plot light, etc.) which it writes excellently. This happens to be a style that can sometimes do quite well in modern literary fiction short story contests.
Nabeel S. Qureshi
@nabeelqu
14h
*Another* apparently AI-generated story wins a literary prize, this time judged by a panel including the novelist Ruth Ozeki.
Literary prizes need to start including Pangram checks in their process, or else change the rules to make AI writing ok. It’s very simple!
3:12 PM · Jun 20, 2026 38K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: AI 特定风格小说再获文学奖 建议引入全字母句检测
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Ethan Mollick 指出 AI 在一般小说写作上较弱，但擅长一种特定风格（隐喻丰富、短句、情节轻），这类作品在现代文学短篇小说比赛中可脱颖而出。@nabeelqu 提及又一篇 AI 生成故事赢得文学奖，评委包括小说家 Ruth Ozeki，进而建议文学奖评选流程应加入全字母句检查（Pangram checks）以识别 AI 文本，或修改规则以接纳 AI 写作。

key_excerpts.text: Ethan Mollick 指出 AI 在一般小说写作上较弱，但擅长一种特定风格（隐喻丰富、短句、情节轻），这类作品在现代文学短篇小说比赛中可脱颖而出。@nabeelqu 提及又一篇 AI 生成故事赢得文学奖，评委包括小说家 Ruth Ozeki，进而建议文学奖评选流程应加入全字母句检查（Pangram checks）以识别 AI 文本，或修改规则以接纳 AI 写作。
Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick AI is generally a weak fiction writer except for one particular kind of fiction (metaphor-rich, staccato sentences, short & plot light, etc.
This happens to be a style that can sometimes do quite well in modern literary fiction short story contests.
Qureshi @nabeelqu 14h *Another* apparently AI-generated story wins a literary prize, this time judged by a panel including the novelist Ruth Ozeki.
Literary prizes need to start including Pangram checks in their process, or else change the rules to make AI writing ok.
